title: riyb #7378
definition:
1) to strive, contend
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to strive
             1a1a) physically
             1a1b) with words
        1a2) to conduct a case or suit (legal), sue
        1a3) to make complaint
        1a4) to quarrel
    1b) (Hiphil) to contend against
